task_goal: Edit note_HrbOn.txt in Markor. Add to the top of the note Inconceivable!
task_goal_rewrite: The file 'note_HrbOn.txt' is edited in Markor such that the text 'Inconceivable!' is added as the first line at the top of its content.

checkpoints.description: The file 'note_HrbOn.txt' is open in Markor's text editor interface.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot displaying Markor's editor window with the content of 'note_HrbOn.txt' visible.

checkpoints.description: The text 'Inconceivable!' is present as the very first line at the top of 'note_HrbOn.txt' in Markor's editor.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot showing 'Inconceivable!' as the first line in the opened note, with any original content appearing below this line.

success_rule: Success is achieved when both required checkpoints are fully satisfied.
